---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

::: {.snuc-hero}
<canvas class="hero-network" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
<div class="snuc-hero-inner">
<div class="kicker">Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile</div>

# Social Networks Group — UC

<p class="lead">Advancing social network science through theory, methods, and data.</p>
</div>
:::

The Social Networks Group – UC is an interdisciplinary research group advancing the theory, methods, and applications of social network science. We bring together researchers from the social sciences, statistics, mathematics, computer science, engineering, and related fields to study complex relational systems through statistical modeling, graph theory, computational methods, and mixed-methods research. We promote methodological innovation, reproducible research, and the development of open-source tools, including the R package [**netmem**](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/netmem/index.html).

::: {.snuc-pillars}
<div class="snuc-pillar"><span class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"></circle><ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="4" ry="9"></ellipse><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"></line></svg></span>**International<br>collaborations**</div>
<div class="snuc-pillar"><span class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="6"></circle><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="6"></circle></svg></span>**Interdisciplinary<br>research**</div>
<div class="snuc-pillar"><span class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 18h6"></path><path d="M10 21h4"></path><path d="M12 3a6 6 0 0 0-4 10.472V15a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h6a1 1 0 0 0 1-1v-1.528A6 6 0 0 0 12 3z"></path></svg></span>**Methodological<br>innovation**</div>
<div class="snuc-pillar"><span class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="8 6 3 12 8 18"></polyline><polyline points="16 6 21 12 16 18"></polyline></svg></span>**Open-source<br>software (netmem)**</div>
:::

::: {.snuc-callout}
<div class="kicker">Postdoctoral Opportunity 2027 · Deadline 14 August 2026</div>
### Call for Expressions of Interest — ANID FONDECYT Postdoctoral Fellowship

We invite outstanding early-career researchers to apply for the ANID FONDECYT Postdoctoral Fellowship 2027 with the Social Networks Group – UC as host institution — across social network analysis, statistical network models, mathematical sociology, computational social science, and methodological/software development for network analysis.

[Learn more →](prospective-students.qmd){.snuc-callout-btn}
:::

## Explore the group

::: {.snuc-cards}
<div class="snuc-card">
### Team
Faculty, doctoral and master's students, research associates, and international visitors.
[Meet the team →](team.qmd){.stretched}
</div>
<div class="snuc-card">
### Research
Research lines, ongoing projects, and open-source software for network analysis.
[See our research →](research.qmd){.stretched}
</div>
<div class="snuc-card">
### Collaboration & Impact
Executive education, consultancy, and our alliance with CHISOCNET.
[Work with us →](collaboration.qmd){.stretched}
</div>
<div class="snuc-card">
### Prospective Students
Graduate supervision across Sociology, Government, and Education.
[Join us →](prospective-students.qmd){.stretched}
</div>
:::

## Alliance

::: {.snuc-alliance}
**[CHISOCNET — Chilean Society for Social Network Science](https://www.chisocnet.org)**   ·   We are proud partners of CHISOCNET, working to develop social network science as a field of reference across Chile and Ibero-America.
:::

<!-- TODO: add a short "Latest" strip here once news/highlights start flowing:
     current visitors, Diplomado cohort dates, new publications, etc. -->
